checkedConditions: OpenAI records provider rate-limit cooldown before checking whether retry attempts remain.
Anthropic records provider rate-limit cooldown before checking whether retry attempts remain.
OpenRouter records provider rate-limit cooldown before checking whether retry attempts remain.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Direct gate after audit lag. OpenAI, Anthropic, and OpenRouter compute retryability once, record rate-limit cooldown for retryable rate-limit errors with the next-attempt delay, then check whether attempts remain. This prevents the next request from stampeding after a final rate-limit failure.
